ab: tatiav, kasiqinaljan aken a na ljemilji tjay vuvu i Ubak.
ch: 昨天，我去部落探訪Ubak爺爺。
en: Yesterday, I went to visit my Ubak grandpa in the tribe.

ab: cuacuay anga amen a ika mecevucevung, singelit anga aken aravac tjaymadju.
ch: 我們很久沒有見面了，我很想念他。
en: We haven’t seen each other for a long time and I miss him a lot.

ab: ka pacun ti vuvu i Ubak tjanuaken, pakanan aken tua siasiak, sake patekeli tua uca.
ch: Ubak爺爺一看到我，就給我吃西瓜，並給我喝茶。
en: As soon as Ubak grandpa saw me, he invited me to eat watermelon and drink tea.

ab: aza talem ni vuvu i Ubak a siasiak qaljemeqem aravac, paqulid tu sanguaq angata.
ch: Ubak爺爺種的西瓜很甜，真的很好吃。
en: The watermelon grown by grandpa is very sweet and really delicious.

ab: tjengelay aken uta tua uca ni vuvu i Ubak, sanguaq aravac nu tja tekelen.
ch: 我也喜歡Ubak爺爺的茶，也很好喝。
en: I also like grandpa’s tea, it’s tasted good too.

ab: ka kincengecengelj, kemsa amen kati vuvu i Muni tua cengelj.
ch: 中午的時候，我和Muni奶奶一起煮午餐。
en: At noon, I cooked lunch with my grandma.

ab: namakakaizuazua a kinsa cengelj ni vuvu i Muni, izua ciqav, kuka, ljasiak katua cirat.
ch: Muni奶奶煮了很豐盛的午餐，有魚、有雞、有南瓜、還有蝸牛。
en: Grandma cooked a big lunch, including fish, chicken, pumpkin, and snails.

ab: nu nakincengelj anga itjen, vayk anga sema puljacengan a kiljaceng.
ch: 我們吃完午餐後，去菜園摘菜。
en: After lunch, we went to the vegetable garden to pick vegetables.

ab: malap tu liav ta vurasi, ta vasa katua laukiu ti vuvu i Muni, tua sipakacu tjanuaken a pasa umaq.
ch: Muni奶奶拿了很多地瓜、芋頭和蕗蕎給我，要我帶回家。
en: Grandma brought me a lot of sweet potatoes, taro and buckwheat, and asked me to take them home.

ab: ku kipusauan tiamadju, sa ku kipazazekati tu mangetezanan aken nu tjayvililj a ljemilji tjayamadju.
ch: 我跟他們道別，說下次再去看他們。
en: I said goodbye to them and said I’d see them next time.
